title: Lab 49: Flatpak Remote Setup
description: Configure Flatpak system repository access for RHCSA 10 practice

tasks: Install the flatpak package if it is not already installed.
Configure a system Flatpak remote named rhcsa-lab that points to file:///opt/rhcsa/flatpak/repo with GPG verification disabled.
Verify that the remote is visible to the system Flatpak installation.
hints: Flatpak system remotes are managed with flatpak remote-add and flatpak remotes.
Use --if-not-exists and --no-gpg-verify for an idempotent local training remote.
solution_outline: Install Flatpak, then add the local training remote as a system remote.
